data.body: Completion-verifier FAILED first: the fabricated-scenario AC needs a STRUCTURED assertion that removal_scenario_grounded in {no,insufficient}, not just mode==fabricated-scenario. Remediated: added checklist_expect:{removal_scenario_grounded: no} to R-removal-rationale-fabricated and the test now asserts it in {no,insufficient}. Amended into the WS11 commit.
